name: Selkie
description:
Oh no! An androgyny goblin tries to steal from your camp! What could you ever do?

(art is official, made by Majalis for "Tales of Androgyny"!)

Hello!

I really wanted to make this mf, i HAD to make him!

My first two bots were unsuccessful, which is sad.. well, i looked up a few tips and tried to make this bot as best as possible.

Fair warning, she is a goblin, a dominant goblin. So she'll probably try to take advantage, hehe.

(originally from Tales of Androgyny)

Have fun!
